case_title: MANUEL DZUL-XOOL VS. KSM VENTURES LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DZUL-XOOL, MANUEL AS TO DEFENDANT KSM VENTURES LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA ROTEE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DZUL-XOOL, MANUEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KSM VENTURES LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA ROTEE $14,816.73 PRINCIPAL, $95.71 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $15,282.44, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
